name: Potato Pot Pie
recipeIngredient: 2 cups Chicken or turkey, cooked and chopped
10 oz Vegetables, mixed, frozen (e.g., peas, carrots), thawed and drained
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook mushrooms and onions in 2 tablespoons dressing over medium-high heat.
2. Add flour and seasonings; gradually add milk, stirring until thickened.
3. Stir in 1 cup dressing, cooked turkey, vegetables, and 1 cup cheese; cook for 5 minutes.
4. Spoon the mixture into a 1 1/2-quart casserole dish.
5. Stir 1/2 cup dressing into mashed potatoes.
6. Top the casserole with the potato mixture.
7. Broil until golden.
8. Sprinkle with remaining cheese; continue broiling until cheese begins to melt.
